label: Admin / Plant Library
items: Plant Library — the seeder now sends the AI up to 500 already-known plants as a "don't propose these" list (was 50), and grows that list as the run progresses so batches 2+ within the same run can't re-propose what batch 1 just inserted. Should drop the skipped count significantly.

Plant Library — the AI is now explicitly told to add a variety qualifier in `scientific_name` for distinct horticultural types like cherry vs garden tomato (e.g. `Solanum lycopersicum var. cerasiforme` vs `Solanum lycopersicum`). Without this, types that share a base species name were silently collapsing onto a single row.
